ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tract */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the tract in square meters */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the tract in meters */,
  "tract_number" INTEGER /* Tract number designation */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS State and County Code */,
  "status_ok" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tract is OK for use */,
  "status_nok" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tract is NOT OK for use */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the tract in meters */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial, agricultural) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the tract */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* Type of vegetation in the tract */,
  "water_sources" TEXT /* Description of any water sources in the tract */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the tract was last surveyed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracts_fips_code FOREIGN KEY ("fips_code") REFERENCES fips_codes ("fips_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tract being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tract data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tract data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tract_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tract */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was recorded */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status (e.g., surveyed, approved) */,
  "status_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tract_status_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tract_status_status_by FOREIGN KEY ("status_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fips_codes" (
  "fips_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FIPS code entry */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-digit state code */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Three-digit county code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Full name of the county */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tract_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tract */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of analysis results */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the analysis results (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who conducted the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tract_analysis_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tract_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tract_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated tract */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature (e.g., pond, forest) */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., natural, man-made) */,
  "feature_location" TEXT /* Coordinates or description of the feature's location within the tract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tract_features_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the responsibilities associated with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
